title: Building One: The Yumeno Apartments
overview: Welcome to the Yumeno Apartments, where Haruki Nakano lives out his everyday life with his four sisters.

title: Building Two: The Twins Homework
overview: Uzuki and Satsuki do their best to finish their homework. Their assignment? A report on their family members!

title: Building Three: Mutsuki's True Colors
overview: Mutsuki is bright and beautiful, and diligent to top it all off. But she shows a different side in front of Haruki...

title: Building Four: Curry and Rice
overview: The grocery shopping must be done, so the Nakano siblings get together to conquer the week's shopping list.

title: Building Five: Satsuki's Anime Clock
overview: Satsuki and Haruki have an unexpected hobby in common. And Satsuki never misses a beat.

title: Building Six: The Siblings' Multiplication
overview: Multiplication is a fundamental skill! Everyone has to learn their multiplication tables in elementary school. If they don’t...

title: Building Seven: The Apartment Complex's Pool Opening
overview: It might be a little early to go to the beach, but that's not going to stop these siblings from having some fun in the water.

title: Building Eight: Definitely Siblings
overview: Do all twins look the same? Join the Nakanos as they look through some family history.

title: Building Nine: For the Love of Pranks
overview: Haruki is on his guard against Uzuki's pranks, but is that was Uzuki is really planning?

title: Building Ten: Mutsuki's Request
overview: Mutsuki has run into a problem she can't handle on her own. Is her request too much for Haruki to handle?

title: Building Eleven: How Yayoi Nurses
overview: Haruki is down with a cold, and the only one to help him out is Yayoi.

title: Building Twelve: The Bond Between Haruki and His Sisters
